block_or_reference: template-only deployment manifest, address book, explorer URL, transaction hash, or reviewer reference
command_or_source_system: template-only address-book generator, explorer, CI job, or operator transcript
redaction_statement: Template only; no raw logs, credentials, signing material, private URLs, or unreleased drop payloads are present.
template_notice: Template only. This file is not completion evidence and does not mark public beta or production ready.
operator_notes: Fill the public-beta verified-addresses retained artifact, validate it with scripts/check_public_beta_verified_addresses.py, then replace this template with reviewed non-local address-book evidence, deployment manifest references, independent address verification sources, chain ID, contract names, and reviewer confirmation.
